'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 58''' is the fifty-eighth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[April 4]], [[1979]].

This issue includes part two of a four-part black & white reprinting of the unfinished story "[[The Kingdom of Ice]]", originally published in color in [[Marvel Comics|Marvel UK]]' ''[[Pizzazz]]'' magazine. The final part of the story was eventually printed in [[Star Wars Weekly 60|''Star Wars Weekly'' 60]].

==Contents==
*"[[Death Trap!]]"
*"[[Snow Fury!]]"
*"The power of Warlock Part 5: The infinity effect!"
*"Micronauts Part 4: Death-Duel at Daytona Beach!" (Continuation)
*"Tales of the Watcher: I accepted the deadly challenge of Zarkorr!"
